changeSet.author: openelis-bioequivalence

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = (SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name IN ('Bioequivalence Sample Receiver', 'Bioequivalence Chemical Analyst', 'Bioequivalence Pharmacist', 'Bioequivalence Researcher', 'Bioequivalence Lab Supervisor', 'Bioequivalence Study Director', 'Bioequivalence QA Officer', 'Bioequivalence Data Manager')

changeSet.comment: Create Bioequivalence lab unit entry in lab_unit_role_map using TestSection ID

column.name: lab_unit
column.valueComputed: (SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory')

changeSet.author: openelis-bioequivalence

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = (SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name IN ('Bioequivalence Sample Receiver', 'Bioequivalence Chemical Analyst', 'Bioequivalence Pharmacist', 'Bioequivalence Researcher', 'Bioequivalence Lab Supervisor', 'Bioequivalence Study Director', 'Bioequivalence QA Officer', 'Bioequivalence Data Manager')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.lab_roles lr JOIN clinlims.system_role sr ON lr.role::int = sr.id WHERE lr.lab_unit_role_map_id = (SELECT lab_unit_role_map_id FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = (SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory')) AND sr.name IN ('Bioequivalence Sample Receiver', 'Bioequivalence Chemical Analyst', 'Bioequivalence Pharmacist', 'Bioequivalence Researcher', 'Bioequivalence Lab Supervisor', 'Bioequivalence Study Director', 'Bioequivalence QA Officer', 'Bioequivalence Data Manager')

changeSet.comment: Assign all bioequivalence roles to Bioequivalence lab unit

column.name: lab_unit_role_map_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT lab_unit_role_map_id FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = (SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory'))

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Sample Receiver')

column.name: lab_unit_role_map_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT lab_unit_role_map_id FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = (SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory'))

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Chemical Analyst')

column.name: lab_unit_role_map_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT lab_unit_role_map_id FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = (SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory'))

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Pharmacist')

column.name: lab_unit_role_map_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT lab_unit_role_map_id FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = (SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory'))

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Researcher')

column.name: lab_unit_role_map_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT lab_unit_role_map_id FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = (SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory'))

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Lab Supervisor')

column.name: lab_unit_role_map_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT lab_unit_role_map_id FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = (SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory'))

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Study Director')

column.name: lab_unit_role_map_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT lab_unit_role_map_id FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = (SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory'))

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence QA Officer')

column.name: lab_unit_role_map_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT lab_unit_role_map_id FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = (SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory'))

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioequivalence Data Manager')
